ticket.subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.raw_subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.description:
Hello SAMBHAV,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from s71z0b-yw.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello,

Good day!

This is Sibi, from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App which you have uninstalled from your Shopify store - s71z0b-yw.myshopify.com. Sorry to see you go!

Could you please share your feedback and let us know if you were facing any difficulties with the app?

We’d be happy to schedule a **free onboarding call** over Zoom screen-share to assist you with setting up and configuring the app as per your needs.

Please respond to this email so we can arrange a convenient time for the call. (or) You can also book a slot for the call according to your availability using this link - **[****Click Here****]**

Thank you, and we look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
